chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 623 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.4373/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.4374/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.4375/2025 (R/Surety) 28.08.2025 Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Mujeeb-ur- Rehman Malano, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application is filed by the applicant seeking return of surety. As per assertions made therein, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it seems that accused Latif Ahmed alias Guddoo Bhutto, who on 25.07.2025, was granted protective bail for a period of seven days, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing original special savings certificate bearing No. HF-150300 of such amount, has surrendered before the trial Court within prescribed period and obtained interim pre-arrest bail, as is evident from order dated 31.07.2025, annexed with this application. Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document, as above, to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
